labels.name: generate_interface
labels.description: Use to generate a new Gravity AI UI composed interface from a prompt. This calls the public generator with the server OpenAI configuration and does not save or publish the result.

labels.name: refine_interface
labels.description: Use to refine a previously generated Gravity AI UI composed payload with a natural-language instruction. This does not save or publish the result.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_interface · Public sink: generate_interface, refine_interface.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_interface · Public sink: generate_interface, refine_interface

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
